findings.description: The closing "Sincerely," and the signer's name/title are visually duplicated in the HTML — they appear once as standalone text and again inside the embedded signature image, causing a sighted reader to see the same content twice.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows one "Sincerely," followed by the handwritten signature, then "Judith A. Wehner / Assistant State Mining Specialist". The HTML renders a standalone "Sincerely," text line, then a signature image that itself contains "Sincerely," and the typed name/title, then repeats "Judith A. Wehner" and "Assistant State Mining Specialist" as separate text below the image.
